tags.note: There are 9 stands in total on this side of the street in 3 clusters (this point stands for all of them)
28 spaces on the ground from 14 hoops; 9 spaces on top that look like the top-tier of a multi-tier storage
The stands are accessed from the car park outside the supermarket but are underneath the building structure.
